videos.title: Trump Drops in on SCOTUS & Bulldozes Judge’s Ballroom Construction Ruling | The Daily Show
videos.description:
Desi Lydic tackles Trump's attendance at Supreme Court oral arguments on birthright citizenship as he pushes to end the constitutional right for "billionaires," and his insistence on continuing construction on the White House ballroom despite a federal judge's ruling to halt it. Plus, Trump unveils plans for a presidential hotel-brary. #DailyShow #DesiLydic #SCOTUS 

Subscribe to The Daily Show:
   / @thedailyshow   

Follow The Daily Show:

Follow Comedy Central:

Facebook:   / comedycentral  
Instagram:   / comedycentral  

About The Daily Show:
Jon Stewart and The Best F**king News Team host The Daily Show, an Emmy and Peabody Award-winning program analyzing the biggest stories in news, politics, and culture through a sharp, satirical lens. The Daily Show redefined the late night show category on TV and, with an audience of over 51M across social media platforms, has become a launching pad for some of the biggest stars in entertainment. 

The Daily Show airs weeknights at 11/10c on Comedy Central.

videos.title: No One Knows What Trump Is Thinking | Storming Out Of SCOTUS | To The Moon!
videos.description:
An administration official insists that President Trump is playing “12-dimensional chess” with his Iran war strategy, the president reportedly had a very bad time at today’s Supreme Court hearing on birthright citizenship, and NASA’s Artemis II mission launched four astronauts towards the moon today.

#Colbert #Comedy #Monologue #ArtemisII #Moon #NASA #PresidentTrump #SCOTUS #BirthrightCitizenship #IranWar #StephenColbert


Subscribe To "The Late Show" Channel: http://bit.ly/ColbertYouTube

Watch full episodes of "The Late Show": http://bit.ly/1Puei40
Listen to "The Late Show Pod Show" podcast: https://link.chtbl.com/Awagtx95?sid=yt
Like "The Late Show" on Facebook: http://on.fb.me/1df139Y
Follow "The Late Show" on X: http://bit.ly/1dMzZzG
Follow "The Late Show" on Instagram: http://bit.ly/29wfREj

Watch The Late Show with Stephen Colbert weeknights at 11:35 PM ET/10:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

---
Stephen Colbert brings his signature satire and comedy to THE LATE SHOW with STEPHEN COLBERT, the #1 show in late night, where he talks with an eclectic mix of guests about what is new and relevant in the worlds of politics, entertainment, business, music, technology and more. Featuring bandleader Louis Cato and “THE LATE SHOW band,” the Peabody Award-winning and Emmy Award-nominated show is broadcast from the historic Ed Sullivan Theater. Stephen Colbert took over as host, executive producer and writer of THE LATE SHOW on Sept. 8, 2015.

videos.title: Trump Drops in on SCOTUS & Bulldozes Judge’s Ballroom Construction Ruling | The Daily Show

Desi Lydic tackles Trump's attendance at Supreme Court oral arguments on birthright citizenship as he pushes to end the constitutional right for "billionaires," and his insistence on continuing construction on the White House ballroom despite a federal judge's ruling to halt it. Plus, Trump unveils plans for a presidential hotel-brary. #DailyShow #DesiLydic #SCOTUS 

Subscribe to The Daily Show:
   / @thedailyshow

About The Daily Show:
Jon Stewart and The Best F**king News Team host The Daily Show, an Emmy and Peabody Award-winning program analyzing the biggest stories in news, politics, and culture through a sharp, satirical lens. The Daily Show redefined the late night show category on TV and, with an audience of over 51M across social media platforms, has become a launching pad for some of the biggest stars in entertainment. 

The Daily Show airs weeknights at 11/10c on Comedy Central.

Desi Lydic tackles Trump's attendance at Supreme Court oral arguments on birthright citizenship as he pushes to end the constitutional right for "billionaires," and his insistence on continuing construction on the White House ballroom despite a federal judge's ruling to halt it. Plus, Trump unveils plans for a presidential hotel-brary. #DailyShow #DesiLydic #SCOTUS

Jon Stewart and The Best F**king News Team host The Daily Show, an Emmy and Peabody Award-winning program analyzing the biggest stories in news, politics, and culture through a sharp, satirical lens. videos.title: No One Knows What Trump Is Thinking | Storming Out Of SCOTUS | To The Moon!
videos.description:
An administration official insists that President Trump is playing “12-dimensional chess” with his Iran war strategy, the president reportedly had a very bad time at today’s Supreme Court hearing on birthright citizenship, and NASA’s Artemis II mission launched four astronauts towards the moon today.

#Colbert #Comedy #Monologue #ArtemisII #Moon #NASA #PresidentTrump #SCOTUS #BirthrightCitizenship #IranWar #StephenColbert


Subscribe To "The Late Show" Channel: http://bit.ly/ColbertYouTube

Watch full episodes of "The Late Show": http://bit.ly/1Puei40
Listen to "The Late Show Pod Show" podcast: https://link.chtbl.com/Awagtx95?sid=yt
Like "The Late Show" on Facebook: http://on.fb.me/1df139Y
Follow "The Late Show" on X: http://bit.ly/1dMzZzG
Follow "The Late Show" on Instagram: http://bit.ly/29wfREj

Watch The Late Show with Stephen Colbert weeknights at 11:35 PM ET/10:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

---
Stephen Colbert brings his signature satire and comedy to THE LATE SHOW with STEPHEN COLBERT, the #1 show in late night, where he talks with an eclectic mix of guests about what is new and relevant in the worlds of politics, entertainment, business, music, technology and more. Featuring bandleader Louis Cato and “THE LATE SHOW band,” the Peabody Award-winning and Emmy Award-nominated show is broadcast from the historic Ed Sullivan Theater. Stephen Colbert took over as host, executive producer and writer of THE LATE SHOW on Sept. 8, 2015.

videos.title: 1 ADULTO SECRETO VS AQUELES CARAS
videos.description:
ADIVINHE O ADULTO SECRETO
Nesse episódio, Aqueles Caras tentam adivinhar quem é o adulto secreto. 
São 4 crianças e apenas 1 adulto, nosso objetivo é encontrar o infiltrado através de perguntas e da voz deles.
Será que conseguimos acertar? Vem descobrir!


Seja membro deste canal e ganhe benefícios exclusivos:
https://bit.ly/AquelesMembros

▶️ AQUELES CARAS ◀️

📲 Instagram e TikTok: @‌canalaquelescaras

◻️ ALVINHO:
◽   / alvinho  

◻️ BELTRÃO:
◽   / beltraogui  

◻️ CHICO:
◽   / chicomoedas  

◻️ RAMON:
◽   / rrdonatello  

◻️ MACIEL:
◽   / macielkudi  

◻️ PIG:
◽   / pigzadaxd  

👉 Episódios novos todas as Terças às 20h, sempre repletos de desafios pra te garantir muito entretenimento, descontração, humor, resenha monstra e risada pra c4r%lh0!
‌
Se inscreve no canal, deixa o like, ativa as notificações e segue a gente nas redes sociais. Beleza?!

📲 Instagram e TikTok: @‌canalaquelescaras

videos.description:
QUEM É BRASILEIRO? FT. MEIOBRASILEIRA
Nesse episódio, Aqueles Caras tentam descobrir quem é Brasileiro.
São 5 participantes, 4 gringos e apenas um que é Brasileiro raiz!
E pra essa missão convidamos a nossa querida amiga Bri ‪@meiobrasileira‬ ! Será que conseguimos acertar?
Vem descobrir!

videos.title: LUCAS INUTILISMO & RIBEIRO - Podpah #1017
videos.description:
Figurinha repetida da casa, Lucas Inutilismo volta ao Podpah pra mais um episódio, dessa vez acompanhado do Ribeiro. Entre histórias aleatórias e um humor totalmente diferente, o episódio vem pra ser totalmente imprevisível.

  / lucasinutilismo  

  / ribeiroaqui  

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
OPPO

A OPPO, uma das 4 maiores fabricantes de smartphones do mundo, usada por mais de 700 milhões de pessoas globalmente, apresenta um novo lançamento no Brasil: o OPPO A6 Pro. O smartphone traz câmera ultranítida de 50MP para registrar cada momento com riqueza de detalhes.
O aparelho conta ainda com bateria de 7.000 mAh que pode durar até dois dias, carregamento ultrarrápido de 80W e carregamento reverso, funcionando também como powerbank.
Com tela AMOLED de 6,57” e taxa de atualização de até 120Hz, o OPPO A6 Pro garante navegação fluida para vídeos, jogos e apps, além de resistência à água e poeira com certificação IP69.

Saiba mais: https://www.oppo.com/br/ e compre já em: https://bit.ly/4dSWbZX
